  "text": "func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string) (string, string) {
n1: 	c, err := loadConfig()
n2: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n3: 	ctx := context.Background()
n4: 	password, err := base62.Random(16)
n5: 	require.NoError(t, err)
n6: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"accounts", "create", "password",
			"-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
			"-login-name", loginName,
			"-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
			"-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
			"-description", "e2e Account",
			"-format", "json",
		),
		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
	)
n7: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

n8: 	var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
n9: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
n10: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n11: 	newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
n12: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
		AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
			e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
		)
		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
	})

n13: 	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)

n14: 	return newAccountId, password
}
"
}

  "generation": 1,

  "text": "func TestConnectTargetCli(t *testing.T) {
n1: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
n2: 	c, err := loadConfig()
n3: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n4: 	boundary.AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
n5: 	newOrgId := boundary.CreateNewOrgCli(t)
n6: 	newProjectId := boundary.CreateNewProjectCli(t, newOrgId)
n7: 	newHostCatalogId := boundary.CreateNewHostCatalogCli(t, newProjectId)
n8: 	newHostSetId := boundary.CreateNewHostSetCli(t, newHostCatalogId)
n9: 	newHostId := boundary.CreateNewHostCli(t, newHostCatalogId, c.TargetIp)
n10: 	boundary.AddHostToHostSetCli(t, newHostSetId, newHostId)
n11: 	newTargetId := boundary.CreateNewTargetCli(t, newProjectId, c.TargetPort)
n12: 	boundary.AddHostSourceToTargetCli(t, newTargetId, newHostSetId)

	// Connect to target and print host's IP address
n13: 	ctx := context.Background()
n14: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"connect",
			"-target-id", newTargetId,
			"-exec", "/usr/bin/ssh", "--",
			"-l", c.TargetSshUser,
			"-i", c.TargetSshKeyPath,
			"-o", "UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null",
			"-o", "StrictHostKeyChecking=no",
			"-o", "IdentitiesOnly=yes", // forces the use of the provided key
			"-p", "{{boundary.port}}", // this is provided by boundary
			"{{boundary.ip}}",
			"hostname", "-i",
		),
	)
n15: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

n16: 	parts := strings.Fields(string(output.Stdout))
n17: 	hostIp := parts[len(parts)-1]
n18: 	require.Equal(t, c.TargetIp, hostIp, "SSH session did not return expected output")
n19: 	t.Log("Successfully connected to target")
}
"
}

input.body:
func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string, CreateNewAccountCli context.Context) (string, string) {
    c, err := loadConfig()
    require.NoError(t, err)

    password, err := base62.Random(16)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    output := e2e.RunCommand(CreateNewAccountCli, "boundary",
        e2e.WithArgs(
            "accounts", "create", "password",
            "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
            "-login-name", loginName,
            "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
            "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
            "-description", "e2e Account",
            "-format", "json",
        ),
        e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
    )
    require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

    var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
    err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
    t.Cleanup(func() {
        AuthenticateAdminCli(t, CreateNewAccountCli)
        output := e2e.RunCommand(CreateNewAccountCli, "boundary",
            e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
        )
        require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
    })
    t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
    return newAccountId, password
}

input.body:
func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string, ctx context.Context) (string, string) {
    c, err := loadConfig()
    require.NoError(t, err)

    password, err := base62.Random(16)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
        e2e.WithArgs(
            "accounts", "create", "password",
            "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
            "-login-name", loginName,
            "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
            "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
            "-description", "e2e Account",
            "-format", "json",
        ),
        e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
    )
    require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

    var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
    err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
    t.Cleanup(func() {
        AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
        output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
            e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
        )
        require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
    })
    t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
    return newAccountId, password
}

input.body:
func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string, ctx context.Context) (string, string) {
    c, err := loadConfig()
    require.NoError(t, err)

    password, err := base62.Random(16)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
        e2e.WithArgs(
            "accounts", "create", "password",
            "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
            "-login-name", loginName,
            "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
            "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
            "-description", "e2e Account",
            "-format", "json",
        ),
        e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
    )
    require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

    var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
    err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
    t.Cleanup(func() {
        AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
        output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
            e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
        )
        require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
    })
    t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
    return newAccountId, password
}

input.text:
func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, loginName string) (string, string) {
    c, err := loadConfig()
    require.NoError(t, err)

    password, err := base62.Random(16)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
        e2e.WithArgs(
            "accounts", "create", "password",
            "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
            "-login-name", loginName,
            "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
            "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
            "-description", "e2e Account",
            "-format", "json",
        ),
        e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
    )
    require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

    var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
    err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
    t.Cleanup(func() {
        AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
        output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
            e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
        )
        require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
    })
    t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
    return newAccountId, password
}
